item.title: Why Anthropic’s Mythos Is a Systemic Shift for Global Cybersecurity
item.description: With the release of Anthropic’s Project Glasswing and Claude Mythos, how should CISOs navigate the arrival of automated exploit chaining, collapsing patch cycles and the inevitable rise of adversarial AI?

item.title: Post-Quantum Cryptography: Moving From Awareness to Execution
item.description: Google recently released important research that moves Q-Day — the day quantum computers will be able to “break the Internet” — up to 2029. How should enterprises secure their systems?

item.title: RSAC 2026 Highlights: From Agentic AI to Active Defense
item.description: How can enterprises scale cyber defenses for the coming agentic workforce? What are the top cyber trends and challenges flowing from our new normal? Let’s explore through an RSAC lens.

item.title: What Is Physical AI, and What Does It Mean for Government?
item.description: From Davos insights to state readiness, let‘s explore how robotics and sensors are moving artificial intelligence into the physical world.

item.title: New Federal Strategies, Rising Risk From Iran Top Cyber Themes
item.description: When cybersecurity experts from the public and private sectors gathered this week, AI and critical infrastructure took a back seat to frontline defense in light of recent international headlines.

item.title: Securing Critical Infrastructure in a Time of War
item.description: A deep dive into Iranian cyber warfare and actionable defenses for network operators.

item.title: From Michigan to Silicon Valley: A Conversation With Mohamad Yassine
item.description: Lessons on humility, careers, the automotive sector, “cowboy coding” and disrupting with AI from a lifelong innovator.

item.title: Defending Your Castle: Best Practices for Smart Home Security
item.description: Some ways to master the essential tools to protect your privacy without sacrificing the convenience of modern smart technology.

item.title: Your Smart Home Is Watching You: Privacy in the Age of AI Robots
item.description: From compromised TVs to AI-powered house chores, exploring the evolving global threats and why human-centric security matters more than ever.

item.title: How Global Power Struggles Are Rewriting Cyber Defense
item.description: Navigating insights from the World Economic Forum’s meeting at Davos on AI-driven threats, the push for digital sovereignty and the weaponization of critical global infrastructure.
